college_info.college_name: Sri YN College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The AP ICET 2026 registration portal will now remain open for the Sri YN College admission to the MBA/PGDM course till Mar 17, 2026, without a late fee. The exam for the same is scheduled to take place on May 2, 2026.

faqs.question: How can I get into Sri YN College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Sri YN College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
MCA Candidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
B.Sc. Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.
B.Com Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.
B.Voc Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.
BBA Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.
BCA Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.
B.A. Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.

faqs.question: What facilities are there at Sri YN College in terms of infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Sri YN College has been rated 4.2 on Infrastructure parameter. Sri YN College offers good infrastructure such as Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Shuttle Service, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus to students. Sri YN College has also been rated 3.8 for Campuslife.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Sri YN College?
faqs.answer: Sri YN College has been rated 4 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: Which courses are available at Sri YN College for students?
faqs.answer: Courses offered by Sri YN College are MBA/PGDM, MCA, B.Sc., B.Com, B.Voc, BBA, BCA, B.A.. These courses are in the stream of Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Science, Accounting & Commerce, Design, Nursing, Humanities & Social Sciences, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ).

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: There are knowledge based courses are provided in our college.

review_content.Placements: By taking BCA, we can secure opportunities with companies like Tata, IT firms, and other software companies. No failures in any subject will kindly allow for the companies. By learning machine learning, we can understand programming languages and try to develop new projects for our company and the world.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, the faculty is very good at teaching, and the campus is filled with different types of greenery. Hostel facilities are available for all long-distance students; the quality is somewhat good. Sports facilities include volleyball courts, a large ground, a gym, and many other amenities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I experienced better education in this college.

review_content.Placements: Every year, in YN college, the campus drives were conducted, and almost all MNCs like Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahendra, HDFC, SBI, and Karvy visited and recruited students having a minimum aggregate of 60% and above in academics. They offered a minimum salary package of 2.5 LPA. There is a placement cell, which is effective, and every year, it works hard to invite many companies to participate in the placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are perfect classrooms with a good amount of airflow, and almost have a capability of 100 seats in a single room. There are a library, computer lab, ideas cell, auditorium, and ground in the middle of the campus. Canteens are little far from business administration block. However, you will get enough time to have food. The quality of the food served in the canteen was average. Hostel seats are very less, so you should join the hostel as early as possible.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2010
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: Good and well established infra structure beautiful climate classes are interactive and learn moral values up to the mark in quality of education faculty also very interactive it is a river bank college the river is Godavari and NACC A Grade College. It is around 21 acres.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The best college in the surrounding of godavari districts.

review_content.Placements: Some of students placed in different IT companies. Above 30% of people placed in jobs. The highest package is 1 Lacs or above and the lowest package is 20000. wipro, and some companies recruit students.60%of people got internship. Students are very clever in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the college we have a library with large number of books. Different type of books for each student. We have also a PG library. In the college they have 5 computer labs for different groups of students. We have hrd centre also. The facilities are top class.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Biotechnology, Micro Biology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of good infrastructure and teaching.

review_content.Placements: 70% of Students are placed in universities for post graduation(M.sc.).Many of them are placed in Andhra University,Nannayya University etc. Not for our but for computer science students got placements in TCS company. We got internships based on Medical coding and Quality Analysis and Quality Checking Courses .
review_content.Infrastructure: No wifi is available for students. Coming to Labs And classrooms they have Good infrastructure.Well developed Library with good literature. As iam a day scholar I know that Hostel facilities are average from my sources. Sports and games are best with developed indoor and out door stadium. Many students are achieved in sports by state and country level.National Cadet Corps(NCC) is best and major part in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri YN College.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 40% of the students get placed in our college. The highest package is nearly 9.0 LPA. The lowest package is nearly 2.5 LPA. The top companies, like Tech Mahindra, TCS, etc., are the ones that visited our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good classrooms with good maintenance. We will have smart classrooms. All canteens, medical facilities, and sports facilities are good. We have a big field of nearly 5 acres, and we have an indoor stadium for playing indoor games too.

admission_process.title: Sri YN College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri YN College admission process is both merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. It offers courses at the UG and PG levels. Candidates who are selected for admission must pay the course fee to secure their seat.
The application process is conducted online. Candidates must contact the admission office for more details.

reviews.review_heading: There are knowledge based courses are provided in our college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the faculty is very good at teaching, and the campus is filled with different types of greenery. Hostel facilities are available for all long-distance students; the quality is somewhat good. Sports facilities include volleyball courts, a large ground, a gym, and many other amenities.

reviews.review_heading: I experienced better education in this college.
reviews.review_text: There are perfect classrooms with a good amount of airflow, and almost have a capability of 100 seats in a single room. There are a library, computer lab, ideas cell, auditorium, and ground in the middle of the campus. Canteens are little far from business administration block. However, you will get enough time to have food. The quality of the food served in the canteen was average. Hostel seats are very less, so you should join the hostel as early as possible.

Good and well established infra structure beautiful climate classes are interactive and learn moral values up to the mark in quality of education faculty also very interactive it is a river bank college the river is Godavari and NACC A Grade College. It is around 21 acres. Good and well established infra structure beautiful climate classes are interactive and learn moral values up to the mark in quality of education faculty also very interactive it is a river bank college the river is Godavari and NACC A Grade College. It is around 21 acres.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in the surrounding of godavari districts.
reviews.review_text: In the college we have a library with large number of books. Different type of books for each student. We have also a PG library. In the college they have 5 computer labs for different groups of students. We have hrd centre also. The facilities are top class.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of good infrastructure and teaching.
reviews.review_text:
No wifi is available for students. Coming to Labs And classrooms they have Good infrastructure.Well developed Library with good literature.
As iam a day scholar I know that Hostel facilities are average from my sources. Sports and games are best with developed indoor and out door stadium. Many students are achieved in sports by state and country level.National Cadet Corps(NCC) is best and major part in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri YN College.
reviews.review_text: We have good classrooms with good maintenance. We will have smart classrooms. All canteens, medical facilities, and sports facilities are good. We have a big field of nearly 5 acres, and we have an indoor stadium for playing indoor games too.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, very good quality education but no cultural events
reviews.review_text:
There are 1lakh books provided in library
40computers in lab only for bcom students
There 3 rooms for bcom students for each year group
We have good and high educated lectures
•the quality of hostel favil are good, food was also good, sports are condu only once a year.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. Laboratory was also available. Library was provided. Classrooms were well-maintained. Hostels were very good, and the warden was also available. The food quality was better. Gym facility was also provided. Sports were also conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the course and college, and I got placed in 2016.
reviews.review_text: In this course, mainly there are a computer lab and all facilities like Wi-Fi, etc. On our campus, there is also a library where every book is available. Classrooms are also good. This college had a hostel, and I did not stay in the hostel. However, my friends said that the hostel is good. There is a huge sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri YN College, Narsasapur, West Godavari.
reviews.review_text: The environment of our college is superb because there is pure air, and Godavari, close to our college, looks very good. Our college has different Wi-Fi routers for different departments with different passwords. The environment in the labs is good. Our college has a canteen facility.

reviews.review_heading: Not only education, more than that.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure in this college. Even private colleges don't have this type of infrastructure. Extraordinary computer labs with good internet speed. Every year annual sports meet will be conducted, there was a special wing for sports and gym. Every year PG cup will be conducted. Most of the students participated in many national events and won many prizes at the national level. There was a canteen with good quality of food at affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Quality of education, support services, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is somewhat good with basic facilities like library, labs, washrooms, and Wi-Fi. Moreover, the facilities are well-maintained, providing for learning and extracurricular activities. The campus supports various programs that help students develop holistically, including sports, cultural events, and research initiatives. Hostels here are designed to offer a safe and comfortable environment. Hostel food is not that good but it is edible.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Kejriwal Institute of Management and Development Studies.

review_content.Placements: Almost all the students who completed their PGDM course from this institute get placed in well-reputed organisations with good salary packages. The placement percentage was 95% for the student of batch 2017-19. The highest salary package offered was around 10 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 4.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was around 2.5 LPA. Many reputed companies like ICICI Bank, Janlakhsmi Bank, HDFC Bank, Vmart, Pantaloons, Fashion Big Bazaar, Easy Day, One India Family Mart, Maruti Suzuki, Asian Paints, Britania, Aprillia Motors, SEBI, Arvind Smart Textiles, Byju's and many more visit the campus for placements. All students were offered the managerial post in different sectors according to their specialisation. The great thing about this college is they provide internship opportunities in a reputed organisation to every student. The duration of the summer internships is three months, and the duration of the winter internships is one month. However, not all organisations paid the stipend to interns, and the stipend depends upon the organisation norms and policies. Last year, the highest stipend offered was around Rs. 25,000 per month by Zomato. The college has a placement cell which coordinates with different organisations and students to match the best job profile and make a good relationship.

hostel_campus.college_name: KIMDS - Kejriwal Institute of Management and Development Studies Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The college aims at providing a warm and homely atmosphere with peace of mind that assists students in their educational pursuits. The modern KIMDS hostel, close amidst a secure atmosphere with glorious facilities, has separate wings for boys and girl. Running hot water is ensured to any or all the rooms through geysers. reviews_list.review_title: College is decent, and you have to be as well.

review_content.Placements: I think the percentage of students placed in my course is about 70-75 percent, but many of the students nowadays go off campus. review_content.Infrastructure: Our hostel facility is also very good, as we have several facilities like Wi-Fi and an entertainment zone.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is good but not the best. If you can go to IITs, please never choose this college.

content.Placements: I think it is about above 75 percent. The highest package offered by this college is 16 LPA. The average package is 4 to 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies that recruit in the college are TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Planet Park, Hexaware, etc. I do not know much about internships, but I think it is a good percentage.
content.Infrastructure: We have well-facilitated labs, but classrooms are not that good. But I think it does not matter because study does not depend on what type of classroom we have; it depends on ourselves. I do not think that hostels are in good condition because there is nothing much to live in, so the hostels are not that good. But I think it does not matter for students who want to be successful.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall college is average and if you want to come, you can.

content.Placements: In my college, around 62.50 percent of the students are placed every year. The highest package is 16 LPA, but it is off-campus. The campus is around 12 LPA, and average packages are around 4 to 5 LPA. I am in the first batch of my course, so there is no record of placement. I am in the first batch of my course so there is no information about that I dont know.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom is not good but other things like the library and Wi-Fi are good in my department. I am not living in the hostels, I am a dayschoolar but the medical facilities sports and games are average, like we play cricket, volleyball, and badminton.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you have no other choice, then without any hesitation, come to this college.

content.Placements: 124 students of CSE got placed in 2024-25. The highest package is 16.5 LPA given by Clear Feed, sourced from the official site of SATI. Most students placed by Technoook, 50 percent of students got placed. There are various courses offered like CSE, CSE block chain, and CSE with cybersecurity, by the CSE department.
content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure for the course and hostels. There are three boys' hostels and four girls' hostels, a very good mess which is managed by students, which allows us to design the menu by our choice. In the college and hostels, Wi-Fi is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is decent, and you have to be as well.

content.Placements: I think the percentage of students placed in my course is about 70-75 percent, but many of the students nowadays go off campus. The highest package is about 20 LPA, and the lowest is about 4 LPA. The average package is about 6 LPA. Infosys is one of the main recruiting companies. Many of the students get internships, and about 20-25 percent get paid internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel facility is also very good, as we have several facilities like Wi-Fi and an entertainment zone.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with the facilities provided here.

content.Placements: Right now, I am in 1st year so my batch placement details could not be provided. So I am mentioning our seniors' placement details in civil branch, around 80% placement is offered, of which 60% is below 6 LPA. Mostly companies come from local and 1 international company is L&T.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, electricity is 24X7, and one common room is also provided in which we can celebrate birthday party, play tennis, cricket, and lastly group discussions. Sports facilities are provided here, like cricket, basketball, chess, volleyball, etc., in a well-mannered way.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Samrat Ashok Technological Institute cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Samrat Ashok Technological Institute JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Samrat Ashok Technological Institute cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 144866 and 291071 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 144866, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 114932.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 144866.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

Considering the Samrat Ashok Technological Institute B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General AI category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with last-round closing ranks of 144866, 177248, and 179229, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the facilities provided here.

reviews.review_heading: This review will make us take decision based on every single thing about college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in departments are limited across different departments, with no extra useful facilities. Quality of food is good in hostel and canteen too. There are separate medical facilities for everyone. It has good sports complex with a big ground, basketball court, badminton court, gym facilities, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is not good, but their placements are average.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are not well maintained; there are cracks everywhere. The library is small, and only 20 to 30 students can fit at a time. Labs are also not maintained. Mess food is average, but the hostel is below average and not in good condition. There are 3 hostels for boys and girls each. There is one canteen open from 10 AM to 7 PM. Medical and sports facilities are also not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure of college are not good. Facilities are not helpful.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college are poor. There is no facilities in college. Wi-Fi is available but at low speed. Classrooms look like government school. Labs are average, not bad as well as not good. Library is average. Poor quality of hostels. Warden is careless, even he does not come at regular interval of hostel. Quality of mess is bad. There is no sports and games play in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: This college is average.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are good. But hostels are not well maintained. The quality of hostel food is very average. Hostel security is average. Wi-Fi and labs of college are good. Classrooms are a little bit of old school design. And the central library is very good. Not having medical facilities. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure of college and hostel. Wi-Fi is available in all the rooms of the hostel and classrooms. Library is available for studying during the day. You can also take books required for the subjects. Quality of mess food is really good. You will get different food on different days.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good and recommended as there is good infrastructure and well qualified staff.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and well maintained. Libraries, sports facilities, big grounds, canteen, and green campus , you will get everything required in an engineering college. Quality of facilities in my hostel are good. Quality of food is also average, and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: For core branches, this college is really excellent.
reviews.review_text: College main building infrastructure is too good looking and reliable from the outside, but classes are outdated and some departments need to renovate. There is a good central library, and the campus has all types of labs, such as heat engine lab, physics lab.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for the students who want to achieve very high in there life.
reviews.review_text: There are smart classrooms with AC. There are very good classrooms and a very good environment for studying. Teachers use projector for teaching. Labs are in good condition and contain different types of machines and technology. The college has the central library.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of boys hostel, especially Jawaharlal Nehru Boys Hostel, is in very bad condition. Quality of mess food is decent but sometimes it becomes below average. Wi-Fi is available but the speed of Wi-Fi is not that fast. There is a library in which you can study during the day.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is not so good, faculty is helpful and acknowledgeable and experienced.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are decent in my college. Infrastructure is also decent. Wi-Fi is available in our hostel. Classroom condition not so good. Library is also decent. Our campus is green, and sports facilities are good. Mess food is decent; sometimes the food is very tasty, but sometimes the food is not eatable. Canteen is decent, not so good, there are not much material.

review_content.General: College had building but not much good. Wi-Fi did not work properly and labs were very old and dusty. Computer did not run fast. Library was open but not much books there. Hostel room was small and bed was not good. Mess food was very bad in taste and sometimes not clean. No sports, no games, and only boring life. Medical things were also not available. faqs.answer: The subject that is tough for you might be very easy to study and grasp for your friend, who finds it interesting. For example, you may find Electromagnetic Wave Theory very tough because of the various technicalities and Engineering theory that it deals with. But, for your friend, it might be fun to learn, as it gives them a channel to learn, explore, and experiment with something new.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with placement but the infrastructure of the college is just above par.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed in the previous year. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and average salary offered is 5 LPA. Every year, various companies visit our college offering placements in various posts with a good package as well as facilities.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is average, and the classes are conducted regularly. The structure of lab and libraries is very good, and guidance is also provided by the faculty members of the college according to their knowledge. Wi-Fi and computers are also good and working.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: About BBA course - Value for money or not?

content.Placements: In our batch not much students got placed maybe like 20 percent only got jobs. Companies did not come regularly for placements, only some small ones like local startups. Package was also not good. The highest salary was 4 LPA. The average salary was 2 LPA. Some students got nothing. Internships also did not happen much, only few students got them in local shops or unknown companies. Roles were mostly like support or sales, not technical or good roles. So, overall placements were not good very below average.
content.Infrastructure: College had building but not much good. Wi-Fi did not work properly and labs were very old and dusty. Computer did not run fast. Library was open but not much books there. Hostel room was small and bed was not good. Mess food was very bad in taste and sometimes not clean. No sports, no games, and only boring life. Medical things were also not available. Hostel was not value for money, they took much fee but nothing was given properly. Wi-Fi was not working and food was very bad in mess. Sports items all broken, and the game did not play properly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: An average college for an average student who just want a degree.

content.Placements: Placement is not good much, only some students got job rest not. I think 20 percent student got placed only. High package is 5 LPA but only 1 person got that, most people get like 2 LPA or less. The lowest is like stypend type 10k or nothing. Company come are not good, small startups mostly. No big name. Internship not easy also, only few like 10-15 percent get some intern. Top role is like sales job or support job, no core job. Not much dev or teach work, mostly BPO type. Many friends try but not even get call.
content.Infrastructure: Infra not good at all. Wi-Fi slow like 2g, some time not work full day. Lab is old machines and no new software. Library small and many books not there. Class have fan only no AC, so hot in summer. Hostel room dirty, bathroom so bad sell all time. Mess food is not tasty, every day same thing, many student get stomach issue. No good doctor or medical thing also. Game and sport nothing big, only small ground and no proper equipment. Over all not nice place for stay or study.

individual_reviews.title: Dr. K. N. M. I. E. T. Review.

The highest package of the course is 8 LPA, and the lowest package of the course is 3.5 LPA, and the average package of the course is 3.5 LPA. faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good college in rural area.

review_content.Placements: Current placement rate is very poor by the college. The highest package was 2.5 and the lowest was 1.25L some good compromise came but they did not give much package. Very less student get a chance of internship. College arrange only one day trip but not gave opportunity for internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is better but labs are not fully equipped. Provide Wi-Fi, library is huge, classroom are also good. I didn't live at hostel so I don't know about that. In my department they don't have much practical equipment very few practical was performed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: As per my experience, there were some campus drives conducted for our batch, and nearly 50-55 students got selected in different companies. From our senior batch, 40-50 students got selected. The placement percentage was approximately 40%. The highest salary package offered was 1.20 million per annum. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 10,000 per month and the average was Rs. 25,000 to 30,000 per month. I don't remember all the companies but some companies like Mahindra and Mahindra, Epic Solutions, some vendor companies of Bosch, Awachat Agro Limited, Vainganga Cement Products, etc., visited the campus for placements. The job profile offered to students were mostly in the core sector and involved on-floor and production work. Some software companies like Epic Solutions offered software roles, and some companies offered design engineer roles. As per the students' interest, the college provided internship letters to almost everyone, but after that, mostly 50-60% of the students did internships. The college has a placement and recruitment cell, and it was but partly useful because they never focus on a specific branch; they focus on the whole college.

overview_faqs.question: Is YRES's Bapurao Deshmukh College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: YRES's Bapurao Deshmukh College of Engineering is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, YRES's Bapurao Deshmukh College of Engineering has a rating of 3.63 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.9 on Campus Life, 2.92 on Placements, 3.73 on Faculty and 3.86 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the YRES's Bapurao Deshmukh College of Engineering is around INR 94000 - INR 364592.

review_summary.college_name: YRES's Bapurao Deshmukh College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This is good for poor one.

content.Placements: Only the top students were able to get on-campus placements. The rest of us had to find our own placements off-campus. In the placement drive for this college, we will see companies that we have never heard of in our life.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is the worst. There is no availability of a boys' hostel, and the college buildings have cracks in them. The teaching skills of the staff are good if you are able to understand them. The staff is friendly if we try to interact with them.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college is good with an excellent campus.

content.Placements: Placements are available in our college, but the quality of placements are very less. Skills are more important for students to get placed, so students with skills get more opportunities for students. Overall looking towards the geographical area, it is providing better opportunities to students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is awesome. The college provides separate departments, and the campus is very eco-friendly. The college has a huge garden. The canteen of the college is also very good with quality food. Classrooms are also equipped with modern teaching facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good college in rural area.

content.Placements: Current placement rate is very poor by the college. The highest package was 2.5 and the lowest was 1.25L some good compromise came but they did not give much package. Very less student get a chance of internship. College arrange only one day trip but not gave opportunity for internship.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is better but labs are not fully equipped. Provide Wi-Fi, library is huge, classroom are also good. I didn't live at hostel so I don't know about that. In my department they don't have much practical equipment very few practical was performed.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in all aspects.

content.Placements: As per my experience, there were some campus drives conducted for our batch, and nearly 50-55 students got selected in different companies. From our senior batch, 40-50 students got selected. The placement percentage was approximately 40%. The highest salary package offered was 1.20 million per annum. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 10,000 per month and the average was Rs. 25,000 to 30,000 per month. I don't remember all the companies but some companies like Mahindra and Mahindra, Epic Solutions, some vendor companies of Bosch, Awachat Agro Limited, Vainganga Cement Products, etc., visited the campus for placements. The job profile offered to students were mostly in the core sector and involved on-floor and production work. Some software companies like Epic Solutions offered software roles, and some companies offered design engineer roles. As per the students' interest, the college provided internship letters to almost everyone, but after that, mostly 50-60% of the students did internships. The college has a placement and recruitment cell, and it was but partly useful because they never focus on a specific branch; they focus on the whole college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: There are no placements. We have a moderate infrastructure. The faculty are good.

content.Placements: In placements, we got one company for the technical profile. Only two students got placed with a package of 2.4 LPA. Other two or three company were of non-technical background. Nobody got the internship at our college. There is a T &P department which only gives false hopes of big MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is moderate. Labs are available for every department. Classrooms are normal. The library is quite large. It could find mostly syllabus related books. There is no sports department. There are no medical facilities in our college. The hostel rooms are okay. I never faced any infrastructure issue during the tenure.

reviews.review_heading: This is good for poor one.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is the worst. There is no availability of a boys' hostel, and the college buildings have cracks in them. The teaching skills of the staff are good if you are able to understand them. The staff is friendly if we try to interact with them.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with an excellent campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome. The college provides separate departments, and the campus is very eco-friendly. The college has a huge garden. The canteen of the college is also very good with quality food. Classrooms are also equipped with modern teaching facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in rural area.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is better but labs are not fully equipped. Provide Wi-Fi, library is huge, classroom are also good. I didn't live at hostel so I don't know about that. In my department they don't have much practical equipment very few practical was performed.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text:
The college has a huge campus. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs for practicals, library, provision store, huge ground for sports and games, a separate building for indoor games, ambulance, garden, canteen, separate hostels for girls and boys, etc., are available on the campus.
Quality of labs and classrooms is quite good. Food available in the canteen is fresh and hygienic. Hostel rooms are good. I have not faced any issues related to infrastructure during my tenure.

reviews.review_heading: There are no placements. We have a moderate infrastructure. The faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is moderate. Labs are available for every department. Classrooms are normal. The library is quite large. It could find mostly syllabus related books. There is no sports department. There are no medical facilities in our college. The hostel rooms are okay. I never faced any infrastructure issue during the tenure.

reviews.review_heading: Unsatisfied student of BDCOE, Sewagram.
reviews.review_text: The classes are not efficient enough for digital or e-learning. There is one basketball court which is not maintained properly. College doesn't provide Wi-Fi during college hours except in computer lab. College canteen provides lots of tasty snacks which are quite cheap in price. But, the quality of hostel food in not upto the mark as complained by the hostel students. The hostels are very old and has not been renovated from a long period of time. Also, the first year hostel building looks like ...

reviews.review_heading: BDCOE, pitfalls in the current status of Engineering Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Labs are up to date. There was no Wi-Fi provision during our time. Classrooms were okay. Library was satisfactory. Literature books were not there in the library. Sports and games were satisfactory. I have no idea regarding the hostel. Canteen was very good. Hygienic and tasty food was served.

reviews.review_heading: Review on BDCOE, Sewagram.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are not fully digitally equipped. Basketball ground is just for the name sake and was never reconstructed even after the complaints. The hostel rooms are very small for 3 person accommodation. The quality of the food at the mess is detoriating.

reviews.review_heading: Review of YRES's Bapurao Deshmukh College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. The library is good, and the college doesn't provide any Wi-Fi facility. Labs are old, and the lab equipment is not in working condition. The college doesn't provide any medical facility. Classrooms are old, and they are not in proper condition. The canteen and hostel rooms are good. There is a problem with internet access on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure but low on education.
reviews.review_text: Mechanical engineering labs and computer labs are one of the best in the Vidarbha region. College infrastructure is good and gets upgraded time to time. College campus is full of greenery and gardens are well maintained by the college management. Students are allowed to sit anywhere in the campus for studies. College has a good play ground and gymkhana.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of teaching faculty, but dissatisfied because of low placement.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities are available in this college. Saperate buildings for Saperate department, Wi-Fi facility, excellent labs, best classrooms, bigger library are available in the campus. The quality of food available in the canteen in quite good. The hotels room are very neat and clean. And we did not face any infrastructure related issues during tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is setting now. So next batch have advantage and. Library is so big so you can increase your knowledge by reading books, medical facilities are good due to present of MGIMS hospital in neighbourhoods of college. Quality of food offers in canteen. Hostel room are good and ventilation in each room.

reviews.review_heading: BDCE at a glance. One of the renowned college in Nagpur University.
reviews.review_text: BDCE is having the campus of about 22 acres including hostels for both boys and girls. Each department is having its own individual building consisting of labs, classrooms and library. BDCE also provides the facility of Wi-Fi to the students for their ease in studies.

reviews.review_heading: Good for faculty but dissatisfied for placement.
reviews.review_text: Games like cricket badminton carrom volleyball etc. Both indoor and outdoor games are conducted each and every department have their own Wi-Fi book also available in the library and for study environment are good also medical and food facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I think I love my college and I am very much satisfied with my college facilities, college surround.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Every department have its own practical lab, expt. Lab, etc. There is very good facility for students to learn each and everything regarding their specified subject. I am very satisfied with infrastructure. Also each and every facility is available in my college.

overview_faqs.question: Is BN College of Engineering and Technology worth all the hype?
overview_faqs.answer: BN College of Engineering and Technology is worth the hype considering the programme it offers and the relaxation it offers. The Institute offers BTech as a flagship programme and offers various specialisations within the same. Apart from this, the Institute is a private institute that was set up by the Baij Nath Charitable & Educational Trust in 2008. It is one of the leading institutes located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. BNCET Lucknow is affiliated with AKTU and BTEUP. The institute has been approved by the All India Council for Technical Education Ministry (AICTE) of HRD (Govt. of India). The institute has been certified with ISO 9001: 2008 certificate. Based on the IIRF ranking 2024, BN College of Engineering and Technology got 164 rank in the 'Engineering' category.

admission_process.title: BNCET Course Admissions 2025 Admission Process

paragraphs: Candidates can secure a seat in the BN College of Engineering and Technology by merit or through entrance exams such as JEE, CAT, and MAT. BNCET offers UG, PG, and Diploma courses such as: BTech, MBA, MBA, and MCA.

BNCEThas a multi-step admission process, which requires a candidate to fill out the online application form and appear for the required entrance exam based on the course the candidate is applying for. BNCET accepts candidates to the BTech course based on their scores in JEE. Scores of candidates in various national-level entrance exams are accepted for admission into MBA, BTech, and MTech.
BN College of Engineering and Technology Admission 2025: Highlights

BN College of Engineering and Technology offers multiple courses for candidates to choose from in Engineering, Management, and Computer Applications. Candidates seeking admission to BNCET Bhubaneshwar can check out updated information in the highlights table below:

BNCET Bhubaneshwar offers multiple courses, and the eligibility criteria vary for these different courses. Candidates need to have a certain aggregate score in class 12, along with a minimum score in entrance exams such as JEE/CAT/ATMA. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for BN College of Engineering and Technology course admissions:

The BNCET admission 2025 is a multi-step process. Candidates seeking to get a seat at BNCET must clear the eligibility criteria set by the college for different courses. Candidates applying for the courses will also be required to appear for entrance exams such as JEE, CAT, MAT, CUET-PG. After filling the application form and appearing for the entrance exams, candidates need to appear for web counselling and then a physical counselling session. Check out the steps below explaining the admission process of BNCET :
Step 1: BN College of Engineering and Technology Online Application Process 2025

Candidates interested in applying for courses at BN College of Engineering and Technology need to fill the online application form on the official website: https://www.BNCET.edu.in/, candidates after successfully registering themselves for their desired course are further evaluated based on their scores in the entrance exam, based on the requirements of the course.
Step 2: Appearing for Entrance Examinations

BN College of Engineering and Technology requires candidates to appear for entrance exams such as CAT/MAT/ATMA/JEE based on the course requirement a candidate opts for. After securing a certain score/percentage/percentile, a candidate can move on to the next steps of the admission process.
Step 3: Web and Physical Counselling

Candidates need to participate in a web counselling session, which is conducted by BN College of Engineering and Technology. Once the web session is over with, candidates can then move on to the physical counselling round of the admission process and submit the required documents along with theBNCET course feesto start with the classes.

Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 791788 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 455630 in 2023.

BN College of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to BNCET can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

BNCET JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for BN College of Engineering and Technology.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the AC service.
reviews.review_text: All kinds of facilities are available here, like Wi-Fi, labs like robotics lab, AC classrooms, a proper library, etc. In the hostel, there are so many things. The hostel does not have proper rooms or a proper food system. It does need to provide healthy, hygienic, and tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: A proper information of my college.
reviews.review_text: The facility is good. The classrooms have a capacity of 100 students. There is no Wi-Fi for students, and the library is not used by students because the faculty is not allowed to sit and read in the library. The quality of the mess meal is very bad; it is too oily food, but the rooms of the hostel are good.

reviews.review_heading: BN college of engineering is one of the best colleges for B.Tech students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel faculty are very good in nature, have polite behavior, and listen to everyone's problems. And Wi-Fi is available every time. Classrooms and libraries are the proper way; classes are clean, and libraries are full of all equipment. Sports activities and food are good in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Short review and very honest review
reviews.review_text: Our college provided facilities such as labs, Wi-Fi, a library, classrooms, playgrounds, and more. It has a good campus and one of the best hostels in this area with few restrictions. Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, and Football Ground.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are good but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not good in the college and the infrastructure is good . There is no wifi available for studies. The library has an old book and classrooms are good for studies .There are not good facilities in the hostel. The food is not good for health. The mess is not good for the hostel. Medical facilities are provided .

reviews.review_heading: Take admission at your own risk.
reviews.review_text: In the CSE lab, broken computers, keyboards, and CPUs are available that do not work properly and also have no proper network connection. The hostel food schedule is not good. And the room is of medium quality; two students are allowed in the room. And Wi-Fi is available only for formality; Wi-Fi does not work, and 2G net is working in Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BN College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college did not provide good infrastructure. The hostel was small. The hostel fee was Rs. 65,000 per year. Hostel life was not good. Some games were available. A gym was not available. The quality of the food in the hostel was average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college for students who cannot afford high fees for engineering.
reviews.review_text: It provides Wi-Fi and RO water. It has 24X7 transport facilities for hostel students if any medical emergency occurs. It has a good campus and one of the best hostels in this area with minimum restrictions. Only first-year students have to follow some of the rules, like entry before 8 PM.

reviews.review_heading: The College Is Really Good.
reviews.review_text: Lab Are Fully Maintain, library is full of silence and avail many of the books that helps us to study and understanding. Classrooms Were Best Part Of The College. Hostel is also good but the mess is not too good its an average. Canteen is Fully Good. Medical Facilities are also maintained. And about sports and games it is also good because the gaming and sports event organised by college every year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BN College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a very pathetic environment for students.

reviews.review_heading: I was satisfied with this college because of management and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The facilites were good in the college with neat classrooms and a library. There was a hygienic canteen in our college and good transportation service. Good hostel facilities were available with good quality food. Lots of sports and fun activities were also organised along with studies for students.

reviews.review_heading: BN College of Engineering and Technology is the best college in Lucknow for Engineering & pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Good classrooms, especially for the 1st year students and air-condition is also in their classroom. The hostel is also average, hostel food is not so good, but the hostel is best and their rooms are also. A big lawn is also available in both the college and hostel for the sports.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good college, but for your placement you should prepare well.
reviews.review_text: Here, the infrastructure is not up to the mark. The infrastructure needs improvement but the overall facilities are good enough. College hostel facilities are like okok and mess food is above average. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are also organised here. Awareness programs are also organised.

reviews.review_heading: I do not recommend students join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is like a school. There is no college life. The hostel is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is now NBA Accredited which shows its productivity level.
reviews.review_text: Overall the infrastructure is very good nowadays as our college is now NBA accredited. There are computer labs for different languages, and robotics lab where we learn about different advance features in languages. One problem we face is with Wi-Fi quality and mobile network as they are too slow in the college building. Hostels are average and they provide rooms and facilities according to fees.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Sai Institute Of Technology and Science (SSITS) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. Whereas, at PG level, Sri Sai Institute Of Technology and Science (SSITS) offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. review_content.Placements: More than 40% of students are placed in our college. I think 4 LPA is the highest salary package offered in our college. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Accenture, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, and Tech Mahindra are the top recruiting companies. More than 20% of students got internship offers in the CSE branch. A web developer is a role offered to students.

These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The subject that is tough for you might be very easy to study and grasp for your friend, who finds it interesting. For example, you may find Electromagnetic Wave Theory very tough because of the various technicalities and Engineering theory that it deals with. But, for your friend, it might be fun to learn, as it gives them a channel to learn, explore, and experiment with something new.

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Sri Sai Institute Of Technology and Science (SSITS) for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: Sri Sai Institute Of Technology and Science (SSITS) courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Sri Sai Institute Of Technology and Science (SSITS) goes up to 969.

faqs.question: How can I get into Sri Sai Institute Of Technology and Science (SSITS) for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Sri Sai Institute Of Technology and Science (SSITS) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityUG DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects.
Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply.
There is no age restriction.After 10th Dipl

Collection of national/international journals, digital library

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college to the build their career.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the facilities and infrastructure were very good. The lab and classroom were digital.

reviews.review_heading: This is the worst college I have ever seen in my life.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi at all on our campus. There are labs and a library with a lot of books, but the hostel facilities are not satisfactory. Sports and games are conducted once a week, but the availability of food in the canteen is also not up to standard.

reviews.review_heading: There are good placements at SSITS.
reviews.review_text: Excellent facilities in the library where a lot of books are available. The Wi-Fi speed is very high on campus. The hostel food is very nice. The dispensary room is available in our college. The college management can encourage the students for playing sports.

reviews.review_heading: To reach the goal, this college is perfect for you.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like classrooms, seminar hall, labs, library, and classes for drawing and dance practice. There is a free room on the 2nd floor for conducting any functions. The hostel serves quality food every day. The mess serves chicken curry and colored rice on weekends. The canteen is also available in college. Medical facilities are also available. Games like cricket, kabbadi volleyball, and basketball are conducted in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good, and there are good separate hostels for boys and girls'.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and the entire campus is lush green. Water facilities are also good, and there is a nice peaceful library. In our college hostel, water facility is very good, and the quality of the food served is also good. The canteen is good, and the ground is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: During our tenure, 10 multinational companies are invited for placements. Now it is inviting more.
reviews.review_text: Our college management provides very good facilities for the students, whether they are food, medical, canteen, hostels, etc. Whenever we need any medical facilities, they will provide immediately. Our college has an ambulance also for an emergency. Students don't have any problems regarding the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to learn how to enjoy life.
reviews.review_text: Labs have basic equipment, but drawing labs don't have benches. Sometimes students don't get enough equipment in most of the labs to do an experiment. There are not enough breadboards to do circuit experiments. We used to get one breadboard for 6 students to do an experiment.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements of 2016 as compared to 2015.
reviews.review_text: In the year 2012, we don't have Wi-Fi, and it was available in the library which had 5 to 6 systems. We had enough books in our library. Hostel food and facilities were homely type and of our Andhra style.

reviews.review_heading: I'm somewhat satisfied with the college. Now, it is good.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility at our college. There are many classrooms. There are many labs with minimum requirements. The hostel provided by the college is somewhat good. The food served is average as compared to the other hostels present in the town.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college in Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Some of the facilities provided in the college are very good. Classrooms are good. The library the worst. No medical facilities are available in the college. Labs are the worst. Sports and games are conducted by the students every year. Our sir will distribute the cups.

reviews.review_heading: Sri Sai Institute of Technology and Science is a good college. One can choose this college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The campus has a healthy atmosphere. A good library is available with the textbooks of all subjects of JNTUA syllabus. Labs are good. Our college always supports games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied. It is a waste of money and time. The placements and teaching are bad.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good with good classrooms, library, well constructed English and communication labs, mechanical and civil labs, IT lab, C lab, and chemical lab. Except for the faculty, labs are very good. The faculty don't take labs seriously.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities but college needs upgrade in many aspects which focus on students
reviews.review_text: Computer labs are very old. We have digital library and other labs are upto the mark. College provide books for semester's for that we have to deposit a security fund around 4000/- which will be refunded. But I didn't got any refund. Infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: If you want knowledge u can join, but if you are looking for getting job in placements don't join.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and ambiance is also too good, greenery is good, college is in end of the town, no disturbance you will experience. If u see the infra and ambiance u can't say no to join in the college. For students Wi-Fi facility is not available, library is there u will get all type of textbooks, they will encourage the talent. Playground is there for games u can play any time.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good on our time, but nowadays, I think most of the faculty left the college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. The faculty members are good and experienced. They have a good subject knowledge. They encourage the students well, and they guide the students. The college has a good environment with a lot of space with trees. The environment is cool on the campus. Some of the faculty members stay in the college hostel, which helps the students in the hostel well. They encourage the students in the sports much.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

reviews_list.review_title: It was a good college for MBA especially, for distance learning program.

review_content.Placements: Our university provides a distance learning program. I did civil engineering from distance learning so I didn't get the campus placement. But those who do regular courses got placements as per their qualifications. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Roles provided were electrical engineer, IT engineer, process executive jobs, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports, and classrooms were available on campus. The hostel and canteen were good and food quality was also good enough. Medical facilities were available during emergencies. The infrastructure of the college was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of P.K. University.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 80% of students were placed. The lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Many students got jobs at Google, Microsoft, and many other companies. Around 75% of students got permanent jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good but the course was very good.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: Where can I find the official PK University BBA fee details?
overview_faqs.answer: The official PK University BBA fee structure is available on the university's official website or can be confirmed through the concerned admission authorities. Since PK University BBA fees are subject to change, students should always verify the latest updates before applying.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: PK University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College is overall good with good faculty and placements in 2023.

content.Placements: Minimum 8 CGPA students are placed. The highest packege of college is 8 Lacs per annum and the lowest 3 Lacs. Top recruiting companies are like adani ports. And minimum CGPA you got internship is 7.5 CGPA and roles offered in companies are like assistant web developed.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in college but they not focus on practical knowledge. And infrastructure are not so good because college are under construction. And college are fully Wi-Fi and library are also good classroom are also with good infrastructure. Hostel are good infrastructure and food also are good in canteen. College are provide medical facilities. And college many cultural activities and sport and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It was a good college for MBA especially, for distance learning program.

content.Placements: Our university provides a distance learning program. I did civil engineering from distance learning so I didn't get the campus placement. But those who do regular courses got placements as per their qualifications. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Roles provided were electrical engineer, IT engineer, process executive jobs, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports, and classrooms were available on campus. The hostel and canteen were good and food quality was also good enough. Medical facilities were available during emergencies. The infrastructure of the college was good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of P.K. University.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 80% of students were placed. The lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Many students got jobs at Google, Microsoft, and many other companies. Around 75% of students got permanent jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good but the course was very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you enjoy your college life with great fun and build a promising future.

content.Placements: Students become eligible for campus placement after the 6th semester and can apply for various on and off-campus placements. Companies like Wipro, TCS and Accenture always visit our college to hire software developer freshers. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA by Wipro. The average salary package offered ranges from 2-5 LPA. Almost 100% of students got an internship at the college. Companies also provide many internships and pre-placement offers. My plan is to look for a software developer job.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not very good, and the walls have not been painted for years. Classrooms are very spacy and well-organised with proper windows, whiteboards and a projector. The library has sorts of books you will need with some interesting novels. Currently, there is no hostel facility for students.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is absolutely worth it.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is not that active, but I heard some of my classmates getting placed in well-known companies. I chose to do Masters in arts, and I have no contacts with my old friends, so I can't say how the placement cell really is.
review_content.Infrastructure: During my tenure, the concept of campus Wi-Fi was new. Labs are excellent. Once I broke a prism by mistake, but the teachers didn't punish me for that. They gained my respect that time. The lab teachers are very kind. I don't know about hostel life.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

review_content.General: There are Very good Infrastructure available For the college, Good Classrooms, Cctv facilities are provided, Very Helping and Brilliant staff are there, every Teacher has a unique Methods for teaching, The quality of Hostels are Very good, rooms and beds And mattresses are provided, The Canteen Is also providing good Food And Monthly mess System, Playground are also better And Institute also Supporting For the various Sports event's, Wi-Fi facility also provided And Library is also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: All are absolutely good available top industries with the highest package.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students were placed in my college. The highest salary offered in my courses was 11 LPA. The lowest salary was 3 LPA. Reliance and Tata were top recruiting companies in my course available for students. 90% of students got internships. Top role offered was manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, mess, hostel, and playground were available at my college. In my hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, games, sports, playground, lab, LCD projector, and bus were available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, and I would recommend joining it.

review_content.Placements: Our batch was good and passing batch students are brilliant and also helpful. Many top companies selected students and are working with them. Many students are in Pune-Mumbai-based companies like Tata Motors, Mahindra and Mahindra, and many other good companies. Many students are working in good companies in senior positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very good and the college campus was also very good. Every facility was available. Hostels were very clean and we had a neat mess. There was a good and huge library with many books. The medical facility was also available 24 hrs. We had a good playground where we played every day.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, mess, hostel, and playground were available at my college. In my hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, games, sports, playground, lab, LCD projector, and bus were available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and I would recommend joining it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good and the college campus was also very good. Every facility was available. Hostels were very clean and we had a neat mess. There was a good and huge library with many books. The medical facility was also available 24 hrs. We had a good playground where we played every day.
