fees_and_eligibility.overview: St.Philominas College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA.

faqs.answer: A:    St.Philominas College is a well-known institution for M.A, MSW, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, B.Voc, BBA, BCA, BHMTT, BSW, M.Com, M.Sc. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. St.Philominas College has course specializations in Hospital / Healthcare Management, Chemistry, Mathematics, Computer Science, Physics, English, Biochemistry.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at St.Philominas College?

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The best college from my experience.

review_content.Placements: St. Philomena's College has a dedicated placement cell that works to facilitate job opportunities for its students. Half of the college students will be placed in many companies. Coming companies - Modal, Infosys, Concentrix, Wipro, and so many companies will visit our campus. Coming to the package it depends on the company standards. I think it does not exceed 3 lacs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Students will be asked to undertake project work every sem. Including the college projects under the guidance of professors giving more practical knowledge. We have not taken for the industrial visits which would beat next semester. We have 6 sharing rooms and it has bunker beds along with attached bathrooms and food is provided 24/7. Mostly the food there is South Indian and it is okay-ish. Currently, I stay in PG the PG room is good all facilities are provided and the food is good and homely.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Philomena was a very wide campus, neat and clean.

review_content.Placements: Some of the startup companies arrived at college for providing students with internships. They selected students, but there was no stipend. They hired on the basis of their criteria, like percentage and the skill set required. Campus interviews were undertaken very rarely, and some students got selected in campus interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Along with studies, co-curriculum activities were conducted. Talents day and annual college day were the best celebrations. In the talents day programme, we had to show our hidden talents, which was very fun. And speaking of the library, it was also loaded with lots of different modes of book collection. Throw ball, volleyball, kabaddi, and many other sports were conducted during sports day.

review_summary.college_name: St.Philominas College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My review of this college.

content.Placements: They had the best placement cell. Every year, interviews from various MNCs and other companies were conducted for the passing out students, and they were assisted by the college for their success. Companies were highly reputed and followed strict rules and regulations while choosing their employees. They arrived at our college during the month of December, conducted interviews, and gave the list of selected candidates, who then joined their company after their graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel included broadband internet access, housekeeping, dry cleaning, and laundry services. Hostels also provided a neat and green environment with sports facilities for students to relax and enjoy their stay. Hostels had mess facilities at subsidized rates where students can enjoy nutritious and hygienic food.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My review of this college.

content.Placements: We had many companies assigned to our college. There were many reputed ones. The highest-paying companies came for job placements and summer internships. Some companies that came last year were JP Morgan, UBS, RBS, Credit Suisse, American Express, MasterCard, Experian, Deloitte, Bajaj Finserv, Nomura, and many more. The stipend ranged from Rs.50,000 to 1.2 Lakh per month, and the final placements paid between 10 and 31 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel included broadband internet access, housekeeping, dry cleaning, and laundry services. Hostels also provide a neat and green environment with sports facilities for students to relax and enjoy their stay. Hostels had a mess facility at subsidized rates where students could enjoy nutritious and hygienic food.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college to join because of cultural activities, sports, and studies.

content.Placements: Around 90 students got placed in the B.Com course. B.Com has the lowest fee structure around Rs. 46,000 - Rs. 55,000. The BCA course fee is Rs. 70,000. It is costly. American companies recruit students abroad. Our college offers courses like B.Com, BBA, BCA, B.A, B.Voc, B.Sc. in forensic science, and others.

The food quality is always good. We have a medical checkup once a year. Our college provides more importance on sports.

paragraphs: St.Philominas College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 3 years.

cut_off.college_name: St.Philominas College Cutoff 2025: Check Karnataka PGCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: St.Philominas College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

St.Philominas College Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 27329 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 15370 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at St.Philominas College. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 27329 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 11305, while in 2023, it was 15949.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

St.Philominas College accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to join because of cultural activities, sports, and studies.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are more than 20 departments. Our college has one of the ancient libraries with a lot of book collections. Classrooms have projectors. The food quality is always good. We have a medical checkup once a year. Our college provides more importance on sports.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college to study.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility provided by our college is good. The rooms of our hostel are nice as two students share one room. The room has basic facilities inside it. We have a good dining facility and the food we get is very delicious.

reviews.review_heading: It is the greatest college of my life.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are really good here. No sharing, one room for one person. Water quality is not that good in hostels, and mess facilities are not very good. The registration process is not very difficult here since it's a residential program, and everyone is allotted a hostel. The hostel fee is affordable.

reviews.review_heading: The ambience of the college is nature friendly and thus also builds a student friendly campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college ground, which is a 400 m track, is the largest ground in Dakshina Kannada. It had a helipad. And they have gym facilities and separate rooms for indoor games. Support for the sport section is very good. Hostel infrastructure is good. It's not newly built, but it has all the facilities in its 4-seater rooms, which have sufficient room spacing and all the equipment in place. The furniture of the rooms is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in our state.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure. Good facilities are provided like Wi-Fi with unlimited access, labs with new equipment, and a library. Sports and games are conducted, and cultural events are also included. Medical facilities are provided, and the mess and canteen are very clean and hygienic. Food quality is acceptable in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Better infrastructure is available.
reviews.review_text: Better infrastructure and facilities are available like labs, library, classrooms, wifi are available. Hostel food quality is decent. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are included. Cultural events are performed. Mess and canteen is hygienic and cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: The hostel food is very tasty.
reviews.review_text: Many students have opted for the hostel; however, our college only has a boys' hostel. Personally, I wouldn't have chosen the hostel due to its age. The infrastructure is the main aspect I didn't like, or perhaps it's the food preference. Honestly, the hostel is not for me. I may be wrong because I haven't lived there, but it's a definite no for me. External expenses range from Rs. 2000 to Rs. 4000.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, memories created are my wealth. Best college ever in Mysore. Don't miss it.
reviews.review_text: Our college is having a good hostel. They provide nutrit foods including nonveg. South indian foods are offered. College os having good classrooms with library and all kinds of lab. Man specialty of our college is the ambie and greenery. The collegw is having a chapel inside and a temple and aa mosque nearby. It is situated admit of a temple, a church and a mosque. It is situated in bannimantap where it is a clean place.

reviews.review_heading: Headlining events and course appropriate departments .
reviews.review_text: The lab for all subjects is well-equipped and ventilated. Each student has his or her own work table too. Hostel for both girls and boys also is well established. Sports equipment is available throughout the day and any number of participants can take place in certain games .

reviews.review_heading: This college is a blessing and it's just that we have a lot of fun.
reviews.review_text: I have no idea about the hostel. But, I guess it's a great place for people who are from far places and budget-friendly too. The warden is friendly too. The students around the hostel are friendly. You can enjoy the college. But the thing is it's a hostel and is a school.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college because every college have it's own pros and cons .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. We have different departments for all courses and we'll equipped labs, and a very big library which consists of 50000 plus books. Canteen facilities are available. Sports also given importance same as education.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: CIHM - Central Institute of Hotel and Hospitality Management provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce and Mass Communication & Media, and have a fee structure of around INR 20,000 to 5,50,000. UG programs include B.Sc., B.A. and BBA. Further, the PG programs include MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM and M.Sc.

faqs.answer: A:    CIHM - Central Institute of Hotel and Hospitality Management provides programmes including PG Diploma, Certificate, UG Diploma, BHMTT, MHMTT, M.Sc, B.Sc, After 10th Diploma, B.A, BBA, MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM, BHM in streams such as Hospitality & Travel, Accounting & Commerce, Aviation, Nursing, Mass Communication & Media, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in General Nursing & Midwifery, Food & Beverage Service, Food Production, Front Office Management, House Keeping, Bakery & Confectionery, Tourism Studies, HealthCare & Hospital.

admission_process.title: CIHM - Central Institute of Hotel and Hospitality Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
CIHM - Central Institute of Hotel and Hospitality Management course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theCIHM - Central Institute of Hotel and Hospitality Managementapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate programmes in fields of Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Mass Communication and Media, Hospitality and Travel, Aviation and Nursing, and more. To know about the eligibility of CIHM - Central Institute of Hotel and Hospitality Management courses, students can visit the website.

CIHM - Central Institute of Hotel and Hospitality Management fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for CIHM - Central Institute of Hotel and Hospitality Management fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on CIHM - Central Institute of Hotel and Hospitality Management admission:

reviews_list.review_title: College infrastructure is good but not well-maintained.

review_content.Placements: The very least percentage of students get placements here, about 10-20%. We got to know that most placement opportunities come from TCS and Wipro. Teachers inform us about internships and many other programs. Overall, it is average.
review_content.Infrastructure: I don't live in the college hostel, I stay in a private hostel. But, from what I've heard from friends and college mates, the food provided there is edible and good. I have visited my friends' rooms and observed that the rooms are spacious and very neat and clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Hons.) in Philosophy - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the supportive faculty and the non-teaching staff also.

review_content.Placements: There was no such placement in my course, but other courses like BCA, BBA, MCA, and CND had placements. The placement cell is very active, and some companies like Byjus and CallConcept, etc., are some of the companies. The placement cell of the college is very active and provides all the notifications.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very helpful and supportive in nature. The library is also very good; there are plenty of books which are helpful for the regarding courses. There is an option for online sources in the library. Overall, the environment of the library is very good with supportive staff.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (B.B.A) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Value for Money and amazed to see the placements of the 2023 batch.

review_content.Placements: Placements do come to the colleges and are pretty decent as per the graduation level. Many students were placed and had converted to the placements. Companies like EY have also visited the campus and have taken more than 3-4 students from the batch with a package of 5+ LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent and the college is divided into two blocks: Arts and Science block. Hostels are decent to live in as per the area. You would get good facilities to all basic amenities, and a ground is also within the campus to have sports or free time in.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. review_summary.college_name: Ranchi Women's College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Accounts - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Analyze before you choose.

content.Placements: The placement faculty is average in this college. Being a government college, Eanchi Women College provides average placement of INR 3L-4L in the commerce field. Recently, there was a placement drive from TCS where 10 students were placed. Companies like Garnier and Jharkhand Gov.. Companies also visit the college. The Science department gets more placements than the commerce department.
content.Infrastructure: The thing that attracted me first towards this college was the infrastructure. The college is full of greenery. Ranchi, being a hill station itself, is full of greenery, which the college also depicts. The campus is huge, with big classrooms, Wi-Fi facilities, an auditorium, water coolers, and washrooms; everything is top-notch. I have not opted for the college hostel, so I cannot provide a review for it, but yes, I have opted for a hostel outside the college, which is very good. All the amenities like Wi-Fi, lift, good food, and good water are provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Accounts - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Ranchi Women's College.

content.Placements: Being a government college, the placement opportunities at Ranchi Women's College are good. Companies like TCS, GARNIER, and various Jharkhand government agencies come for placement programs. The teachers also conduct workshops and training sessions to improve the skills needed for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The first thing that attracted me was the infrastructure. The college's facilities are commendable. It is filled with trees and sitting areas. Walking in feels like entering a garden. It is also neat and clean. Since I did not opt for the college hostel, I cannot review it. However, the cleanliness and sanitation facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College infrastructure is good but not well-maintained.

content.Placements: The very least percentage of students get placements here, about 10-20%. We got to know that most placement opportunities come from TCS and Wipro. Teachers inform us about internships and many other programs. Overall, it is average.
content.Infrastructure: I don't live in the college hostel, I stay in a private hostel. But, from what I've heard from friends and college mates, the food provided there is edible and good. I have visited my friends' rooms and observed that the rooms are spacious and very neat and clean.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Philosophy - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the supportive faculty and the non-teaching staff also.

content.Placements: There was no such placement in my course, but other courses like BCA, BBA, MCA, and CND had placements. The placement cell is very active, and some companies like Byjus and CallConcept, etc., are some of the companies. The placement cell of the college is very active and provides all the notifications.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very helpful and supportive in nature. The library is also very good; there are plenty of books which are helpful for the regarding courses. There is an option for online sources in the library. Overall, the environment of the library is very good with supportive staff.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (B.B.A) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Value for Money and amazed to see the placements of the 2023 batch.

content.Placements: Placements do come to the colleges and are pretty decent as per the graduation level. Many students were placed and had converted to the placements. Companies like EY have also visited the campus and have taken more than 3-4 students from the batch with a package of 5+ LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent and the college is divided into two blocks: Arts and Science block. Hostels are decent to live in as per the area. You would get good facilities to all basic amenities, and a ground is also within the campus to have sports or free time in.

reviews.review_heading: Analyze before you choose.
reviews.review_text: The thing that attracted me first towards this college was the infrastructure. The college is full of greenery. Ranchi, being a hill station itself, is full of greenery, which the college also depicts. The campus is huge, with big classrooms, Wi-Fi facilities, an auditorium, water coolers, and washrooms; everything is top-notch. I have not opted for the college hostel, so I cannot provide a review for it, but yes, I have opted for a hostel outside the college, which is very good. All the ameniti...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ranchi Women's College.
reviews.review_text: The first thing that attracted me was the infrastructure. The college's facilities are commendable. It is filled with trees and sitting areas. Walking in feels like entering a garden. It is also neat and clean. Since I did not opt for the college hostel, I cannot review it. However, the cleanliness and sanitation facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is good but not well-maintained.
reviews.review_text: I don't live in the college hostel, I stay in a private hostel. But, from what I've heard from friends and college mates, the food provided there is edible and good. I have visited my friends' rooms and observed that the rooms are spacious and very neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the supportive faculty and the non-teaching staff also.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very helpful and supportive in nature. The library is also very good; there are plenty of books which are helpful for the regarding courses. There is an option for online sources in the library. Overall, the environment of the library is very good with supportive staff.

reviews.review_heading: Value for Money and amazed to see the placements of the 2023 batch.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent and the college is divided into two blocks: Arts and Science block. Hostels are decent to live in as per the area. You would get good facilities to all basic amenities, and a ground is also within the campus to have sports or free time in.

reviews.review_heading: Ranchi Women's College - a conservative college.
reviews.review_text: The campus only has academic buildings. The classrooms are decent, but there is no availability of projectors or smart boards. Wi-Fi is available in important areas like the reception, but not in the classrooms. Essential facilities like washrooms and drinking water are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: All about Ranchi Women College: This is the college for management.
reviews.review_text: Every facility that students want and need now is in the college, and off-campus there is a library, gym, lab, banks, a huge campus, events, seminars, and various activities, and the teachers are so supportive. Their teaching skills are so good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in the city.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is beautiful, especially the ambiance of this college. There are separate classrooms for different branches. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There are individual libraries for all departments. The library of arts block is much better than the science block.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college for girls in Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: Very nice facilities and faculty members are present in the college, and you have a good library for your personal study. Hostels are also there for students. All types of labs are present for their respective courses, as is a very big playground. Sports and games are also played often.

reviews.review_heading: The not-so-perfect college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor to be honest. The classrooms are not clean, some not even properly lit. The library has very few books and is mostly empty. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students there. The hostel in arts block is not good. No canteen facility.

reviews.review_heading:
*Dissatisfied*
Fees is nominal the studies are not.
reviews.review_text: Women's college established in 1954, is under Ranchi University with courses up to postgraduate level in arts, Science and commerce stream. Courses in B.Ed IT and computers have also been started. The college has good infrastructure and faculty and has a glorious past. The road leading to the college is busy and there is parking problem outside.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities provided here are not that good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not good enough. Only economically weak students can live there. Many facilities are not provided. The library and labs are adjustable. Equipments in the labs are not proper. Mess food is not that good. A canteen is not available. Medical facilities are also not available. During the winter, the college organises sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of library, labs, smart classes, etc. are available. Food is good and canteens are also great. Medical facilities are available in the college. All the facilities which are important for the students are commendable.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good facilities.
reviews.review_text: I can proudly say that the faculty are excellent at teaching and hold Ph.Ds. The college has a hostel for students that provides bonding and learning to students who come from different areas. The site of the hostel is healthy, and the students can join the outer unit cost with 6,000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for women with good academic records.
reviews.review_text: There are two separate campuses for science and art students known as the science and art block. All the classrooms, labs, and library are in good condition. There is no Wi-Fi. There is a hostel facility for girls. Hostel fee is affordable. There are ground and gym available.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT courses stands around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT are Computer Science Engineering, Communications Engineering, VLSI Design, Automobile Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT?

faqs.answer: A:    Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM in streams such as Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Communications Engineering, VLSI Design, Automobile Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.

reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in 2024 and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our college consistently provides placement training for us. This training is very useful and helps us in our placement drive. About 70% of the students get placed in many companies, including MNCs. The top roles are software engineering and full stack development, and the minimum salary package is 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The first-year hostel is very nice, but the hostels for the second, third, and fourth years are good but old. The college infrastructure is very good, and the library is nice. Our college has a very nice infrastructure, and the classrooms have smart boards, which are very helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Simply a good college.

review_content.Placements: For our department, there are very few core companies that came for campus placement. So the chance to get job through on campus placement is very low. But many IT related companies came and definitely we get placed if we have computer knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my department, the classrooms are smart classes which having smartboards. But Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs are pretty good to do the practicals and library has lots of books in each section. Hostel is not so good but it is very secure. Food is average.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college and best knowledgeable students.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed in a course and college is over 90%. They got placed in computer science and engineering. Top recruiting companies include Google, Microsoft, Wipro, MNW, and TCS. Top companies recruited students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for the CSE department include classrooms, libraries, laboratories, a computer lab, and audio-visual rooms. The quality of the facility in a hostel can vary depending on the instruction, but it can include good food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Mahendra Institute of Technology Review.

content.Placements: I'm studying 2nd year, and placements in this college are good now. The highest package is 24L per annum, and the average package is 3.5L per annum. The top role offered is software developer in my department and many more. Overall placement percentage is good to see.
content.Infrastructure: Good classrooms and free library make studying comfortable for students. No extra charges for the library, and labs are also good to see and work in. The quality of food is different from other colleges, and sports are also different. In the CSE department, everything is going well.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2024 and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college consistently provides placement training for us. This training is very useful and helps us in our placement drive. About 70% of the students get placed in many companies, including MNCs. The top roles are software engineering and full stack development, and the minimum salary package is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The first-year hostel is very nice, but the hostels for the second, third, and fourth years are good but old. The college infrastructure is very good, and the library is nice. Our college has a very nice infrastructure, and the classrooms have smart boards, which are very helpful.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Simply a good college.

content.Placements: For our department, there are very few core companies that came for campus placement. So the chance to get job through on campus placement is very low. But many IT related companies came and definitely we get placed if we have computer knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: In my department, the classrooms are smart classes which having smartboards. But Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs are pretty good to do the practicals and library has lots of books in each section. Hostel is not so good but it is very secure. Food is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is the best way for your bright future.

content.Placements: 75% of students got placed from our college. 18 LPA is the highest package, 5.5 LPA is the average package and the least package is 3.5 LPA. As per the placements, our college is the best and good for all. Placement training classes are provided for our course from the starting of 2nd year which means the 4th semester and those placement classes are very clear and useful for our placements.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the facilities are excellent. In our campus, we have facilitated computer labs and Chemistry labs and a room of knowledge (library). In a week, 5 days are working days. Saturdays and Sundays are leave days and last but not the least, sports activities are well and good.

description: Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT TNEA cutoff 2025 has been released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admissions to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations for students belonging to different categories and quotas. During the last round, the Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 155149 and 234822 for students in the General category.

In this section, candidates can check round-wise and year-wise cutoff data for different categories from the past three years. As per the Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive branches for admission were B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Information Technology, with last round closing ranks of 155149, 157066 and 164289, respectively, for the General AI quota.

Getting an idea of previous years' cutoffs helps students better understand the cutoff trends and prepare for the upcoming exams accordingly. To assist in the same, below is a table provided where students can view or download the consolidated round and year-wise TNEA cutoff PDFs. In Tamil Nadu, admission to BE/BTech, BE (Sandwich) and MTech Computer Science and Engineering (Integrated) courses is based on class 12/JEE Main entrance exam scores. hostel_campus.college_name: Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Mahendra Institute of Technology has well-furnished hostels with facilities like purified drinking water, hot water, cold water, 24-hour power backup, common reading room, dining hall and requisite medical facilities.
Facilities for communication, entertainment, and indoor games such chess, carom and modern gym are also provided to each hostel separately.

library.description:
Mahendra Institute of Technology has a spacious library with well stacked Books, Journal and Magazines. There are more than 3847 titles with 10283 volumes of Books in engineering, technology, science and management. The Digital Library of institute has 771 CDs containing learning material on various subjects and 247 e-Journals and Magazines. The Library has online book search and issue facilities.
Audio Visual Section and Reprographic facility is also available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and best knowledgeable students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for the CSE department include classrooms, libraries, laboratories, a computer lab, and audio-visual rooms. The quality of the facility in a hostel can vary depending on the instruction, but it can include good food.

reviews.review_heading: Mahendra Institute of Technology Review.
reviews.review_text: Good classrooms and free library make studying comfortable for students. No extra charges for the library, and labs are also good to see and work in. The quality of food is different from other colleges, and sports are also different. In the CSE department, everything is going well.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024 and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The first-year hostel is very nice, but the hostels for the second, third, and fourth years are good but old. The college infrastructure is very good, and the library is nice. Our college has a very nice infrastructure, and the classrooms have smart boards, which are very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Simply a good college.
reviews.review_text: In my department, the classrooms are smart classes which having smartboards. But Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs are pretty good to do the practicals and library has lots of books in each section. Hostel is not so good but it is very secure. Food is average.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best way for your bright future.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the facilities are excellent. In our campus, we have facilitated computer labs and Chemistry labs and a room of knowledge (library). In a week, 5 days are working days. Saturdays and Sundays are leave days and last but not the least, sports activities are well and good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is a temple of learning.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is well developed and it has good and sufficient hostel facilities for the students to stay and study. The college contains efficient labs filled with course-oriented equipment which help students to enhance their knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for good future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. All the necessities have been fulfilled by the institution. The college has good classrooms with smart boards which are helpful for the students to understand better about the subject. We have a good library to gain our knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT.
reviews.review_text: In our department, information technology has facilities like huge labs, many projector rooms, a department library, etc. available. Our hostel is average, depending upon your selection, there are normal rooms and deluxe rooms available, and the food is worthy and the canteen is available. For medical emergencies, there is a 24X7 ambulance facility to the hospital. There is a very large sports ground, indoor stadiums, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am a little satisfied because of the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The classroom and library are good but there is no Wi-Fi, currently, it is unavailable in this college. The lab is also strictly allowed once a week for use. But the hostel is a little bad and the hostel food is also a little bad to eat daily.

reviews.review_heading: I am not much satisfied and it is not as expected.
reviews.review_text: We have classrooms with the board. There are very less smartboard facilities. Library is available. Labs are properly maintained. Hostel facilities are very low. There are very less restroom facilities. Food in the mess is not hygienic and not that good. Medical facilities are fine. Sports and games are not provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure was nice and placements are only for IT sector.
reviews.review_text: Food was worst but the infrastructure was a little nice. There is a sports ground but we played once on Utsav function. There is no first aid in our block and no medical support. There are 2 buildings, one was an annex building and the other was the main building.

reviews.review_heading: This course is the best. It provides fine infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an average infrastructure, and it is very old design. Gardens are not maintained well. It provides all laboratories in our college. Wi-Fi is not provided to the students. The library is average, and the hostel food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college for placements and learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very. It gives positive vibes to the students, and the hostel facility of the institute is very well. It provides clean rooms, and the food quality is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Placements in our college are very good, but some areas like symposium, etc., have to be improved.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life is good but not much enjoyable and not much strict here. So, you can use mobile phones in the hostel, and the mess is very comfortable for you. The mess fee is about Rs. 3,000 only. Non-vegetarian is served on the campus, and a restaurant is also available on this campus.

reviews.review_heading: I had a great experience here, and you will absolutely like this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides an awesome hostel, and I have stayed for 3 years in the hostel only. There was a high-speed internet facility in the hostel and also 24 hours of electricity facility. There is a library on the main campus, and the classrooms are neat and clean. They are also providing smart classrooms nowadays. Teachers will teach most of the syllabus through PowerPoint presentation. The food served in the hostel is better compared with outside food. Its quality is good, and even the quantit...

highlights.summary: The MAT 2026 February session (PBT mode) examination for admission to the MBA course has been conducted. The CBT mode examination is scheduled for Mar 8, 2026.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Many students looking for better jobs
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network but not very active
Loved in first year but not in later years

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, MCA and PG Diploma. Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini courses stands around INR 1,60,000 to 5,46,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini is a good institution for MCA, BBA, MBA/PGDM, M.A, PG Diploma, BCA, B.Com, B.M.C, B.Voc, B.H.A, B.Sc, B.A. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini are Fashion Design, Travel & Tourism Management, HealthCare & Hospital, Transport & Logistics, English.

faqs.answer: A:    Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini provides programmes including MCA, BBA, MBA/PGDM, M.A, PG Diploma, BCA, B.Com, B.M.C, B.Voc, B.H.A, B.Sc, B.A. in streams such as IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Mass Communication & Media, Design, Accounting & Commerce, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Humanities & Social Sciences, Hospitality & Travel, Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Fashion Design, Travel & Tourism Management, HealthCare & Hospital, Transport & Logistics, English.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good teachers.

review_content.Placements: Students must score more than 70% to get placed in our college. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, etc. Some students got placed from our college in Decimal Technologies. Top roles offered are MS executive, data analytics, java developer, programmer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities like computer labs, canteens, IT classrooms, a hostel, etc.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are qualified, helpful, and friendly. The course curriculum is not up to date as compared to the industry. Exams are moderate. If you study well, you can pass exams easily.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Mass Communication (BMC) - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of the overall exposure provided.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't have a proper placement cell. It contacts the companies and tries to get some students placed. The highest package is about 3-4 LPA and the least package is 15k INR per month. Seniors do help in getting some contacts but not all of them are well educated. The placements here are not worthy at all.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infra is average with facilities such as classrooms, 1-2 labs, a library with 4-5 computers, etc. There is no hostel in the college. There is a small playground to sit and talk. Sports and games are not good. There is no Wi-Fi and no projector facility in the classes. Washrooms are also not proper. The location is prime but its infra is below average.

review_summary.college_name: Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college with good infrastructure, facilities, and placements.

content.Placements: Our college has excellent placements. They provide internships and interview assistance. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA to 20 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA to 7 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1.8 LPA to 3 LPA. Internships are available. Top roles offered are software developer, software tester, and system analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average, and the campus is small. Lab facilities are available. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners, whiteboards, and projectors. The library has good collection of books. Our college has three canteens. Bus facility is available. The quality of the food served is average. Medical facilities are available. For sports, we have a small basketball court and a volleyball net. There is a garden on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Mass Communication (BMC) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am personally not satisfied because I took admission against my parent's wishes.

content.Placements: 0% placement, when it comes to money they make 1000 of promises, but at the end of your course they'll do nothing, no job security. You'll enter in college with so many dreams but come out with shattered dreams by your hands only. I suggest to take admission in good college if you are able to pay money in good amount.
content.Infrastructure: It was okay, its a private college so I don't think so anybody will face any issues in it. Else there is no ground to play or other curriculum activities. Wi-Fi is not available in college, library is available but you are not going to study something that anybody will need of it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good teachers.

content.Placements: Students must score more than 70% to get placed in our college. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, etc. Some students got placed from our college in Decimal Technologies. Top roles offered are MS executive, data analytics, java developer, programmer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities like computer labs, canteens, IT classrooms, a hostel, etc.
content.Faculty: All teachers are qualified, helpful, and friendly. The course curriculum is not up to date as compared to the industry. Exams are moderate. If you study well, you can pass exams easily.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Mass Communication (BMC) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the overall exposure provided.

content.Placements: The college doesn't have a proper placement cell. It contacts the companies and tries to get some students placed. The highest package is about 3-4 LPA and the least package is 15k INR per month. Seniors do help in getting some contacts but not all of them are well educated. The placements here are not worthy at all.
content.Infrastructure: The infra is average with facilities such as classrooms, 1-2 labs, a library with 4-5 computers, etc. There is no hostel in the college. There is a small playground to sit and talk. Sports and games are not good. There is no Wi-Fi and no projector facility in the classes. Washrooms are also not proper. The location is prime but its infra is below average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements are good here, but you need to work for them.

content.Placements: Everyone in the college gets an internship, and around 95% of students are placed. Students were placed in Asian paints and are working with some great architects and are getting industry knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good enough, but the food in the mess is average. The campus is small. You just have very few places to hang out. All you do have is three canteens and no good food in either of them.
content.Faculty: Teachers are kind of good, but rather than focusing on the industry's needs, all they do teach is theory. You will be a bit disappointed by the teaching methods.

paragraphs:
Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theJagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohiniapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG and PG programmes in fields of Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Banking and Finance and Insurance, and more. To know about the eligibility of Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini courses, students can visit the website.

Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini admission:

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Ground
Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Ground

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Design Lab, Communication Lab, DBMS Lab, Data Structures Lab, Housekeeping Lab, Training Restaurant, Garment Construction Lab

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with good infrastructure, facilities, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, and the campus is small. Lab facilities are available. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners, whiteboards, and projectors. The library has good collection of books. Our college has three canteens. Bus facility is available. The quality of the food served is average. Medical facilities are available. For sports, we have a small basketball court and a volleyball net. There is a garden on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am personally not satisfied because I took admission against my parent's wishes.
reviews.review_text: It was okay, its a private college so I don't think so anybody will face any issues in it. Else there is no ground to play or other curriculum activities. Wi-Fi is not available in college, library is available but you are not going to study something that anybody will need of it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many facilities like computer labs, canteens, IT classrooms, a hostel, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the overall exposure provided.
reviews.review_text: The infra is average with facilities such as classrooms,  1-2 labs, a library with 4-5 computers, etc. There is no hostel in the college. There is a small playground to sit and talk. Sports and games are not good. There is no Wi-Fi and no projector facility in the classes. Washrooms are also not proper. The location is prime but its infra is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good here, but you need to work for them.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good enough, but the food in the mess is average. The campus is small. You just have very few places to hang out. All you do have is three canteens and no good food in either of them.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our college and faculty members are very helpful and caring towards every student.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 2 lifts but the only problem is that students are not allowed to use lifts but we use it without permission. I do not live in hostel but I know that the quality of food served in the hostel is too good as one of my friends brings us food from the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Indeed best faculty, good infrastructure, good placements, and they provide good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, the facilities and infrastructure that JIMS has are more than good because all classrooms are well air-conditioned. The benches they provide are good and the classrooms are well maintained. In our college, we have three canteens and one of them is the best because it is very similar to fancy cafes. The only drawback that our college has is that we don't have that much big ground or court to play on, but we have cricket nets and a volleyball court which is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: A well-maintained college with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good and the canteen is also maintained. The library is also well maintained. Quality of food is also good for sports activities. College also provides facilities to play games but the rules are strict even though, they have a 75% attendance criteria which they should remove asap.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college that has average infrastructure but has good crowd and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is only for the teachers not for the students. Classrooms are clean and they take care of all the required necessities like air-conditioners are working properly and are good in condition. Labs and library are fine. I only faced some problems in the library like sometimes, there is no previous year question paper available. Otherwise, it's okay.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but I want to say that the fees you are paying is not worth it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay. We have a separate parking, a badminton court,  2 canteens and Nescafe etc. In each classroom, we have two air conditioners, 1 smart board and 1 projector board. Labs are also very big. In labs, we have 40 to 45 PCs, so that all students can practice.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are up to the mark. The classrooms are air-conditioned and have projectors, which is very convenient for students. There are 4 canteens here, that have a lot of varieties of foods. Sports like basketball, badminton and table tennis are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best place to start your career.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about infrastructure, the college is almost providing everything like labs, smart air-conditioned classrooms, library, etc. The hostel is also good providing all the facilities. The only thing which is not good here is Wi-Fi setups are not available, and quality food is not served.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent faculty members with good internships opportunities but bad infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The network connection has no problems, meanwhile, the classrooms are a bit messy and seats aren't up to the mark. Computer labs and library have no complaints. They take 100% care of the medical facilities. There are total 4 canteens and they serve the best food at an affordable price. Its sports week in January that's all for cricket, football, and badminton. Though we can play volleyball and basketball in the college playground as well.

reviews.review_heading: JIMS Sector-3 Rohini is part of a larger educational group named Jagannath Institution.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is pretty good, with excellent classrooms and washrooms. The furniture is very good, and classrooms and libraries are well-ventilated and air-conditioned. They use smart boards in every classroom, and the washrooms are also clean.

reviews.review_heading: Life in JIMS is amazing and worthy of the fees charged by the college for the particular course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of the Journalism department are good that is more than average. There is no Wi-Fi available but the classes infrastructure is amazing. There are 2 ACs and 5 fans in each class. The library has an enormous number of books and magazines and it is huge. There are radio and tv studios available. Medical facilities are average and almost all main kinds of sports are available like football, basketball, volleyball, etc.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini

likes.text: College is also providing internships so that we can learn a lot from it in a good sense.

college_info.intro: Footwear Design and Development Institute offers a diverse range of programmes to students at UG and PG levels. The college offers programmes mainly in the fields of Footwear Design & Production, Production and Management, Retail & Fashion Merchandise, Leather Goods, etc. The most popular programmes offered at FDDI Hyderabad is BDes, MBA, and MDes. These programmes are offered to students across several specisalisations. Candidates can check the Footwear Design and Development Institute Hyderabad popular programmes in the table given below:

faqs.answer: A:    Studying for an MBA in Retail and Fashion Merchandise from FDDI Hyderabad opens the door to a successful career in different fields, i.e., International Trade & Compliance, Export-Import Management, Global Supply Chain & Logistics, Retail and Fashion Merchandise Consulting, etc. A few career opportunities after an MBA from FDDI Hyderabad that can be pursued are given below:Retail and Fashion Merchandise ManagerExport-Import ManagerGlobal Supply Chain AnalystForeign Trade AnalystLogistics a
faqs.question: What are the job opportunities that I can seek after completing MBA from FDDI Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: A:    After pursuing a BDes from FDDI Hyderabad, highly successful career prospects follow. The career after a BDes completely depends on the abilities and interests of the candidates. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Footwear Design and Development Institute courses are offered to students at UG and PG levels across several specialisations. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Footwear Production, Footwear Design, Fashion Design, Retail & Fashion Merchandise, etc. Some of the most popular programmes offered at FDDI Hyderabad include MBA and BDes. The MBA programme is offered to students for a duration of 2 years while the BDes programme is offered to students for 4 years.

faqs.answer: A:    Students can expect to pay around INR 485200 - INR 780000 for the programs offered by the Footwear Design and Development Institute, Hyderabad.
faqs.question: What is the fee for different programs at Footwear Design and Development Institute, Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: A:    FDDI Hyderabad provides a three-year BDes programme. The FDDI Hyderabad BDes course fee of INR 9.4 lakh needs to be paid by the students over the three years. It should be noted that the provided fee is taken from the official website of the institute/sanctioning authority. It can still change and, hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the tuition course fee for the BDes course at FDDI Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: A:    There is an age limit to apply for UG programme of FDDI, Hyderabad. The age limit for the bachelor's programme shall be 25 years as on the July 1 of the admission year. However, there is no age limit to apply for master's courses. Besides, candidates must also fulfil the educational requirements to apply for admision.
faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply at FDDI Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates cannot get into Footwear Design and Development Institute,  Hyderabad without entrance exam scores. The institute conducts AIST for admission to UG and PG programmes. Aspirants must first register for the course to appear for the entrance test. AIST is a pen and paper test. AIST for UG courses includes a total of 126 questions divided into four sections. The paper for PG courses is divided into four sections and includes 175 questions.
faqs.question: Can I get into Footwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad without entrance exam?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty but hoping for better placements.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is unknown but the average pay is 15–16k for freshers. Top recruiting companies include retail conglomerates like Aditya Birla, Reliance, and a few renowned boutiques in the city. 60% of students got internship from my course in companies like Da Milano, Ritu Kumar of reliance, Uniqlo, etc. Most of the students went for off-campus since there were more opportunities. Since I'm in department of fashion design, the roles offered were in retail brands and few off-campus roles like fashion stylists, assistant designers, merchandising, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Footwear - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty members along with neat hostel rooms, mess and canteen are provided by the college.

review_content.Placements: Average package of the recent placements was around 7.5 Lacs. You can get placed as a retailer or a designer. The students having above 8 and 9 CGPA get to sit in the placements first. If you are confident enough then obviously you will get selected.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is really good. The faculty members here are very friendly, they will help you out with everything. The hostel rooms and mess are also good. Infrastructure is also good here having separate buildings for each course. There's a lawn along with a sports complex for you to play.

review_summary.college_name: Footwear Design and Development Institute, Hyderabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Leather - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best campus , great faculty and staff

content.Placements: The top roles offered were senior designers, senior design consultants. The placements in the last couple of years have been almost around 96%, and the average package offered was around 5-6 Lakhs per annum. Top recruiting companies were Puma, Adidas, Yoho, and a few other companies.
content.Infrastructure: There?s full time wifi available for digital purposes. Footwear Labs has the best machines. The machines are brought from Italy and are maintained. The hostel is pretty good. The food is simple and suits all kinds of people, like North/South. We have a nice ground and a temple as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty but hoping for better placements.

content.Placements: 40% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is unknown but the average pay is 15–16k for freshers. Top recruiting companies include retail conglomerates like Aditya Birla, Reliance, and a few renowned boutiques in the city. 60% of students got internship from my course in companies like Da Milano, Ritu Kumar of reliance, Uniqlo, etc. Most of the students went for off-campus since there were more opportunities. Since I'm in department of fashion design, the roles offered were in retail brands and few off-campus roles like fashion stylists, assistant designers, merchandising, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Footwear - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members along with neat hostel rooms, mess and canteen are provided by the college.

content.Placements: Average package of the recent placements was around 7.5 Lacs. You can get placed as a retailer or a designer. The students having above 8 and 9 CGPA get to sit in the placements first. If you are confident enough then obviously you will get selected.
content.Infrastructure: It is really good. The faculty members here are very friendly, they will help you out with everything. The hostel rooms and mess are also good. Infrastructure is also good here having separate buildings for each course. There's a lawn along with a sports complex for you to play.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend this college.

content.Placements: Placements at this college are not good. For our seniors in the fashion design department, they were providing placements mostly in the retail sector. Only 3–4 seniors got placed in a design house. The highest salary package offered was 4.5 LPA, and the lowest was 1.5 LPA. Most people need to find jobs by themselves.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are also good and spacious. A library is also available, but it is not always open during college hours. Hostel rooms are good, spacious, and three-seaters. There are two girls' hostels. There is no canteen. For small things, we have to go outside. Mess food is manageable. The condition of washrooms is pretty bad. They clean the rooms once a week only.

paragraphs: Footwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad admission 2025is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BBA, BDes, MDes and MBA at the UG and PG level. To get admission to theFootwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers four courses in streams such as Business & Managemnet Studies and Design. The application process at Footwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about theFDDI, Hyderabad course admission2025.

overview_faqs.question: Is Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication good for PGDM?
overview_faqs.answer: Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication popular programmes is PGDM. After completing the PGDM programmes from this college, students can take various roles in OTT Platform Managements (Netflix, Hotstar, Amazon, Sony, and others), Event and Entertainment Companies, and others. Students are given an in-depth knowledge of various current practices in media with smooth and quality content marketing and production. PGDM students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Zee News, JWT, ABP News, and others. Hence, PGDM course at Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication is quite good.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the fee for PGDM at AIMC Dwarka?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication PGDM is INR 6.20 lakh. The total fee includes a refundable caution deposit of INR 10,000 and INR 10,000 as CRC/ Alumni Fund. The total fee is a cumulative of components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, etc. Aspirants must pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute.

overview_faqs.question: Is the tuition fee for PGDM course at Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication (AIMC) worth it?
overview_faqs.answer: At the PG level, the Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication (AIMC) offers PGDM courses to students. The total tuition fee for the PGDM is INR 6 lakh. The basic eligibility criteria for the PGDM course is a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate. The accepted entrance exams are MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, ATMA, and others. Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication's popular programmes is PGDM. After completing the PGDM courses from this college, students can take various roles in OTT Platform Management (Netflix, Hotstar, Amazon, Sony, and others), Event and Entertainment Companies, and others. Hence, paying INR 6 Lacs becomes worthy.

overview_faqs.question: How is the experience of studying in Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication?
overview_faqs.answer: The experience of studying in the Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication is quite good. AIMC is approved by AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education). The college is ranked 11th by The Week 2024 under the Mass Communication & Media category and 15th by the India Today 2024 under the Mass Communication & Media Ranking category. Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication offers placement assistance to students. Studying in such as college provides great learning experience to students.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Television Radio Journalism & Production - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty because they are good. I am also satisfied with good placements.

content.Placements: Many students get placed as interns in various media channels in roles like video editor and content writer, and many secure positions in digital media. Some students also get placed at Curly Tales. The placement facility is very good, offering many opportunities for students. The placement packages are also quite satisfying.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is also very good. Classrooms and labs are well-equipped, and the library has books from various categories. The canteen food is also good. The college environment is amazing, with very neat and clean classrooms, a well-maintained canteen, and an overall clean campus. The college provides excellent facilities for students, including sports, games, and various self-improvement extra classes.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Television Radio Journalism & Production - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College faculty and teaching method is good, providing us practical exposure way more than expected.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students get placed from our college. The highest package offered is 7 LPA. Renowned media houses like India Today, NewsX, and Sports Yaari visit the campus to provide opportunities to students. The roles offered include positions in the input desk, output department, and anchoring in media house etc.
content.Infrastructure: We don't have a hostel, but the infrastructure is excellent. The Wi-Fi service is very good. Classrooms are clean, and the library is accessible 24/7. The canteen offers good food with a variety of options. Overall, the college provides a very homely experience after classes.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Television Radio Journalism & Production - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and facilities are nice, and teachers are very helpful to the students.

content.Placements: The college has almost 100% placement, and the salary packages are good. Nearly all students secure internships, and some receive proper placements. Prominent media houses and channels visit the campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is excellent and student-friendly. The campus provides good Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms, and library facilities. The canteen offers quality food, and the Wi-Fi facility is highly beneficial for students. Access to the library is easy and convenient.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Television Radio Journalism & Production - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I love the practical exposure.

content.Placements: The college offers 100% placement, with the highest package being 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies include NDTV, NewsX, ANI, and ABP. The roles offered include editors, reporters, anchors, and camera persons. The experiences shared by students are excellent.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities, including studios, classrooms, and the library are excellent. The canteen food feels very homely. The college also provides sports facilities with both outdoor and indoor games. The Wi-Fi facility is very good, and the video editing labs are equipped with modern facilities, along with a well-equipped ad lab.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Digital Media and Online Journalism - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Your ideal place for a career in media.

content.Placements: Everything is connected to hardcore journalism and the digital world, including production work, video editing, content writing, and research-based work. Top companies like India Today, ANI, Aaj Tak, and ABP recruit from here. The college also provides great internships in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a homely environment that feels like home. Once you join, you would never want to leave. It has the best Apple systems and the most expensive equipment, which you can use anytime. There are no strict conventional rules, and the faculty feels like family.

admission_process.title: AIMC Dwarka Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: AIMC admission processbegins with registration where candidates are required to apply for the course of their choice. Admission to the offered courses is based on entrance exam scores. Below are the steps to get a seat in the institute:
STEP 1: AIMC Dwarka Application Process 2026

The application forms are generally released in January every year. Candidates can apply online or collect the application form along with the prospectus. The application fee for each course is INR 900. Alternatively, the application form can also be availed through post by sending a Demand Draft (DD) in favor of "Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication", payable at New Delhi.
STEP 2: Selection

Candidates are required to qualify entrance exam for all courses. Aspirants need to passCAT / XAT / MAT / ATMA / CMAT / GMATscores for PGDM programme. Selected candidates need to come for apersonal interviewround. Besides, the institute also conducts Apeejay Entrance Test for admission to PG Diploma courses. There will be direct admission for those students with 60% and above marks in graduation, and those pursuing final year but have 60% and above marks in their first two years are exempted from the written test. However, they have to appear before the interview panel.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

After careful evaluation of the previous academic record and performance in the admission test/ interview, the Admission Committee prepares a list of shortlisted candidates. The preference is given to those who display the required aptitude in subjects of the course applied for. Selected candidates need to pay theAIMC Dwarka feeto confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: How are Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication students prepared to be industry-ready?
faqs.answer: Students are made industry ready through immersive and industry-aligned training that goes beyond textbooks. The curriculum includes such subjects that ensure that they understand content creation, distribution and even monetization strategies for digital platforms. The college offers Drone Journalism as a specialised course providing hands-on training in aerial cinematography a rapidly growing field in media production. Also the students are exposed to AI-driven content creation helping them master tools for automated editing, deepfake technology and also audience analytics. Through live industry projects, internships and even skill-building workshops the college ensure that the graduates enter the workforce with practical expertise and not just theoretical knowledge.

faqs.question: Is Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication hard to get?
faqs.answer: No, Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication is not hard to get for dedicated students. The mode of Apeejay Institute of Mass Communication course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on merit, GD, PI, and entrance exam scores. The accepted entrance exams are CAT / MAT/ XAT/ GMAT/ NMAT/ SNAP / ATMA, and others. Candidates willing to get admission through CAT must first register for the CAT exam. Then appear for the CAT exam. Then with valid scores, apply on the official website of the college.
