review_summary.college_name: Shriram Institute of Management and Technology (SIMT) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It's a moderate college, and you have to study on your own to get placed.

content.Placements: There were less placements from the college, and the college claimed that approximately 4000 students were placed from starting, but this was not true. Only 5 or 6 students got placed in the college. Top companies like TCS and Infosys offered packages of 4 LPA to 5 LPA, and the role was IT calling.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi was not provided by the facility all the time, and computers were old, running below Windows 7. This created many issues on the spot. Teachers were good and supportive. The library was very bad, and no one could get books from there. It only took extra charges. There were no hostel facilities, and the food was average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: SIMT is good college to choose because of its teachers, they will support you until you get a job.

content.Placements: Barely 10% of students get placed in our course. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is around 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Paytm and Wipro come to our college. There are no internships from the college campus but they can try off-campus. Top roles offered in our course are web developer, data scientist, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are available like Wi-Fi facility, air-conditioning computer labs, nice classrooms, and libraries full of books. There is no facility in hostel but quality of food in our canteen is pretty average. Every year they organise sports week and annual functions.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014

There is no placement cell, no training session and all. fee_structure.heading: Golden Valley Integrated Campus Courses & Fees 2025
fee_structure.overview: The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for Golden Valley Integrated Campus admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

faqs.answer: Golden Valley Integrated Campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. faq_section.heading: FAQs
faq_section.introduction: The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for Golden Valley Integrated Campus admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

answer.text: Golden Valley Integrated Campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.

rows: B.E. / B.Tech

Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.
M.E./M.Tech

Candidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
MBA/PGDM

Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
After 10th Diploma

Candidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects.
Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply.
There is no age restriction.

overview_faqs.question: Can Golden Valley Integrated Campus be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Golden Valley Integrated Campus are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, After 1th Diploma. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Golden Valley Integrated Campus has a rating of 3.7 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.3, 3.7 and 3.7 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Golden Valley Integrated Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: New admissions should stop themselves from joining this college.

content.Placements: There are no placements in the course I am studying, because there is no facility of placements in the college. I am requesting you to not join this college. I am facing so many problems in this college. There is barely any study related activity in this college. So please do not join this college.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facility. I had such a bad experience in this college with the food, it is the worst and tastes bad. Quality is also not good. So please avoid the mess food. Join the nearest PGs to eat quality food. There is no best course available in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and great environment.

content.Placements: Almost 80 percent of the students in our college or course have been selected for placement; the lowest salary package is 3 LPA and the highest salary package is 5 LPA. The roles offered are software developer, software analyst, etc., and many campus drives are conducted at our college.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is kept neat and clean. The infrastructure of the college is so good. The surrounding environment helps us to improve in social activities or extracurricular activities; computer labs are good and Wi-Fi is available; classrooms have projectors for presentations and teaching.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great college with a lovable environment .

content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of the students got placements from our course. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The highest package is 8 LPA; the roles offered are software development, quality analyst, etc.; many campus drives are conducted at our college .
content.Infrastructure: The campus is well-maintained and clean. The infrastructure of the college is good. The surrounding environment helps us improve in social activities or extracurricular activities. Computer labs are high-tech and have projectors to give presentations.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Peaceful environment with great infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college offers training for placement in various stages, including soft skills training, aptitude training and mock interviews. The placement percentage is as high as 70 percent, and the placement team is very supportive as well as very friendly for us to get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good; they have provided us with lab computer smart classes and mess; the classes have projectors and are under CCTV surveillance; the systems are also well managed; and there is a very beautiful environment to study, work and learn more good things.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great college with a satisfying environment.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of the students got placed in our course. The lowest sales package offered is 3 LPA. The highest package is 8 LPA. Roles offered are software development and software analysis. We have a good placement cell and doing great work of getting placements to the college .
content.Infrastructure: We have a good and well-designed infrastructure for computer labs; connections are also available and there is a good environment for libraries. Good quality meals and a neat and fresh canteen; very good ground for sports and for playing games. A well-maintained, clean canteen cooks hygienic food for good health .

review_content.Placements: Placement rate estimates mainly fall between 50-65%, with some optimistic claims going up to 90%. Average packages likely reside between Rs 3.5 LPA to 6 LPA. One of the recent graduates got 11 LPA package at a company. Companies include TCS, Infosys, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College of Engineering, Thalassery has 30 acres hilltop campus with smart classrooms, labs, central library, Wi-Fi, hostels, buses, and sports facilities. reviews_list.review_title: The college has good facilities and infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely good and beautiful because of the faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome campus with good staff. A very good infrastructure with a green ambience.
reviews.review_text: Each department has its own seminar Hall, labs fully air conditioned, and Wi-Fi connection available in all classrooms. Library is very spacious. Decent food, both in veg and non veg, but a little bit crowded, maintained neatly. The doctor is available once a week. Excellent sports club and activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for studies.
reviews.review_text: College of Engineering, Thalassery has 30 acres hilltop campus with smart classrooms, labs, central library, Wi-Fi, hostels, buses, and sports facilities. It also has a research incubation center and auditorium. Our college has vibrant cultural and technical activities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is overall good. There's free Wi-Fi available in the department block. Lab facilities are also good. There are multiple computer labs, like the CG/ML lab, the NOS lab, the Department lab, the project lab, etc. Each has enough systems. Classrooms are also advanced. Every classroom has a projector, and some have smart boards. The hostel is also good. Rooms are spacious and have good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Politely, I am satisfied with my college overall.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for each department. Labs are often less, but they are available at any cost. Classrooms are conveniently satisfactory, although the desks and benches are small and slightly difficult to sit on. Hostels are very comfortable, and the food is decent.

reviews.review_heading: A normal day in my college.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are very good. There is a big library to get resources for studies and projects. There are big labs to help and upgrade our skills and knowledge. I'm a day scholar, so I don't know about the hostel, but my friends have said it's very clean and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with outdated teaching methods.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. Adequate WiFi great classes nice labs. It's great altogether. Our department is well equipped with modern facilities to support both academic and extracurricular activities. The campus has high-speed Wi-Fi accessible in all academic blocks and hostels ensuring uninterrupted connectivity for students and staff. The classrooms are spacious equipped with projectors and smart boards and provide a comfortable environment for learning.

reviews.review_heading: A value for money college with good campus.
reviews.review_text: Library and classroom are okay. Wi-Fi and lab facilities are available. Hostel only for girls. Boys should opt for private hostels. Canteen food is quite good. Medical facilities are available in the admin block. Sports are very good in COET. You can have so much fun.

reviews.review_heading: Life of a student living in Coet.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very neat and clean and very comfortable. It is a very fun place, roommates are nice, canteen food (mess) is also very tasty, and you get a variety of food each day. Overall, nice experience. Now the infrastructure of the college is nice and not bad. It is very earthy green vibes, cool infrastructure, totally.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In each classroom, the projectors are available, and all are smart classrooms. The college boasts a large library with a vast collection of books and e-books. Each engineering branch has its own dedicated labs for practical learning. The college provides Wi-Fi connectivity in both academic and hostel areas.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college is located on a hilltop in Kundoormala near Eranholly Hills. The college boasts a large library with a vast collection of books and e-books. Each engineering branch has its dedicated lab for practical learning. The college provides Wi-Fi connectivity in both academic and hostel areas.

reviews.review_heading: My college life: Ups and downs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is nice, there is a separate building for every department. The canteen service is nice, there is a lot of space to walk. The atmosphere is pleasant.

reviews.review_heading: Life in B.Tech in CSE.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very nice and very clean, and has good quality labs and equipment. The hostel is reliable for students, with moderate-quality food. The college canteen provides a variety of foods. Overall, the facilities are bearable.

reviews.review_heading: Average student in CSE department.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very brilliant. There are labs and library for studying. The classrooms are very comfortable and easy to focus on studying. Sports and games area is handled by qualified faculty members, and they support every student who has potential and interest in certain sports. Hostel is very clean and good. Canteen food in mess area is very delicious, the room you get is large and comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our computer department classroom has good facilities and infrastructure, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Sports and games events are conducted in our college, and Wi-Fi will be available in our department and labs. The central library is located at the central position of the campus.

review_summary.college_name: SDM P.G. Centre for Management Studies and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good management.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements but do not expect much. Companies like Cognizant, Axis Bank, Aditya Birla, Samsung, and Oracle visit the campus for recruitment. Tata and many companies recruited students in many places like Bangalore, Chennai, Kochi, Mysore, etc. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 15,000 per month - Rs. 30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has air-conditioned classrooms. Wi-Fi is available and good library facilities are provided. There is no hostel available. You have to look for separate accommodations. I stay by paying rent of Rs.5,000 per month.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It's is best college in my opinion . it is has best placements and faculty.

content.Placements: Almost 70 to 80 percent were placed. The lowest package was 6 lakhs per annum. The highest was 10 lacs per annum. Many companies are there, mainly CEO and CMO, are recruited. All students are delighted to be enrolled in this college because it offers the best placements in India.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good enough for all types of needs to be met. Library classrooms and labs are good enough. Wi-Fi should be a little laggy because of many connections, but not too bad. Rest assured, all facilities are good, and some may even be the best. Medical facilities are superb.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good and better facilities. Student makes their own placements in better way.

content.Placements: 1. 97% of students were placed in our course. 2.30 Lacs in the highest package,5 Lacs in average package and 12 Lacs in minimum package in my course. 3. Dell and software companies are top recruiters. 4.80% of students got inter 5. Manager role offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: 1. Wi-Fi, Labs, Classrooms, library and parks, computer department, Science department available in my college. 2. Good quality products in our school canteen, medical facilities, sports, parks, parking hall, stadium, and more many facilities available in our college.
